facts.fact: BTCAAAAA-26189: Refactored stepper_ribbon.py to enforce styles.py protocol — removed all inline setStyleSheet() with hardcoded hex colors, replaced inline QFont() with create_font(), replaced setCursor() with set_hand_cursor(). Added get_stepper_button_style() and get_stepper_arrow_style() to styles.py.

Styles.py is the single source of truth for all UI styling. Enforcement command: grep for setStyleSheet|QFont|#[0-9A-Fa-f]|padding:|margin:|color: in component files must return 0. Note: current grep is overly broad — matches f-string color refs like color: {COLORS['x']} which are valid.

BTCAAAAA-26199: Log viewer freeze fixed by replacing QTextEdit with QPlainTextEdit + QSyntaxHighlighter for lazy rendering. Added lazy tab loading (content on first activation), capped at 100 files for All Logs tab and 5,000 lines per file. Refactored EVENT_PATTERNS to use color keys from styles.py COLORS dict.

BTCAAAAA-26451: Added FreezeDetector watchdog (daemon thread captures main-thread stack trace when Qt event loop blocked >4s), BackgroundContentLoader (QRunnable for off-thread log I/O), LineClassification + ContentCache (pre-compile regex once, classify on load for O(1) filter toggles). Removed sync rglob/stat from _on_view_current_log.

BTCAAAAA-26393: Log viewer plugin evaluation — ADOPT community plugin for agent monitoring (simple use case), BUILD from scratch for trade log viewing (needs Nautilus event classification, high-contrast dark theme, lazy loading). UIEngineer endorsed ADOPT+BUILD recommendation with WCAG/theming/SDK-fs findings.

BTCAAAAA-26670: Added setObjectName to all key widgets in BlockConfigItem and StrategyBlocksPanel for Qt testability and stylesheet targeting. Widgets: position_label, block_name_label, logic_badge, signals_label, up_button, down_button, remove_button, signals_widget, blocks_scroll_area, blocks_container, empty_label, strategy_exit_section, strategy_exits_container.

BTCAAAAA-26209: Added 4 tests for strategy browser close paths (reject, accept, rapid open/close, native closeEvent) — all previously at risk of RuntimeError when timer callbacks or signal chains accessed deleted Qt C++ widget objects.
BTCAAAAA-26185: Registered self._provider_combo in _combo_fields so AI_PROVIDER selection is persisted on save. Updated settings tests for QComboBox API (editable combo for model fields).

BTCAAAAA-26132: Fixed _on_quick_preview() end_date to floor to midnight UTC (replace hour=0, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0) so the 30-day preview data window doesn't slide by wall-clock time on every invocation.

WindowGeometryMixin in styles.py provides correct Qt5 window geometry/state persistence for multi-monitor setups. Saves pos, size, maximized flag, screen name, and maximized screen name as separate QSettings keys. Avoids saveGeometry()/restoreGeometry() entirely due to Qt5 maximized-state desync bug.
BTCAAAAA-637: Maximized-window screen fix — saves maximized_screen_name so a window maximized on screen 4 re-opens maximized on screen 4, not screen 1.

BTCAAAAA-638: Screen position regression fix — after rect-intersection fails for all screens, fall back to screenAt(saved_pos) point-based lookup. Also saves pos_screen_name independently of intersection threshold.

BTCAAAAA-26161/BTCAAAAA-26162: changeEvent handler tracks WindowStateChange transitions (maximize/restore) and immediately updates QSettings to prevent desync between Qt/WM state and saved settings. Fixes 'second-click re-maximize' bug.
BTCAAAAA-26202: showEvent calls setWindowState(WindowMaximized) AFTER super().showEvent() so the WM receives the maximize request on an already-mapped window, keeping Qt and WM state in sync.
BTCAAAAA-26634: Restored scripts/launch_strategy_builder.py and src/strategy_builder/ dependencies from main after they were deleted by stale-code cleanup.

UI thread must never be blocked by I/O — use QRunnable (BackgroundContentLoader) for log file reading, QThread for heavy computation. FreezeDetector watchdog captures main-thread stack traces when event loop blocked >4s.

Styles.py provides create_font() and create_monospace_font() helpers — all component files must use these instead of inline QFont(). styles.py also provides set_hand_cursor() and apply_hand_cursor_to_buttons() for consistent cursor UX.

UI component files still have 155 hardcoded hex color violations and 10 inline QFont() usages (backtest_config_panel.py, block_search_panel.py, custom_title_bar.py, data_update_modal.py, strategy_blocks_panel.py). These need refactoring to use styles.py helpers.
